message:
fix: nvm installed_check and slb URL mismatch

1. Fix lang.nvm installed_check:
   - OLD: "test -d ~/.nvm && command -v node"
   - NEW: "test -d ~/.nvm && ls ~/.nvm/versions/node/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."

   The old check failed because 'command -v node' requires nvm.sh to be
   sourced first. The new check directly verifies node versions exist
   under ~/.nvm/versions/node/ without needing to source nvm.

2. Fix slb URL in security.sh to match checksums.yaml:
   - security.sh used: .../slb/main/scripts/install.sh
   - checksums.yaml had: .../simultaneous_launch_button/main/scripts/install.sh

   The mismatch meant checksum verification would always fail for slb.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -355,7 +355,9 @@ modules:
       - base.system
     installed_check:
       run_as: target_user
-      command: "test -d ~/.nvm && command -v node"
+      # Check nvm exists AND at least one node version is installed
+      # Can't use 'command -v node' because nvm.sh isn't sourced in this context
+      command: "test -d ~/.nvm && ls ~/.nvm/versions/node/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
     verified_installer:
       tool: nvm
       runner: bash

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 # ============================================================
 # Data-only manifest index. Safe to source.
 
-ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="4b0c8e777e319db1b76fa4bc023ffb662c021bf2afed35d617a7ada2507d23a8"
+ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256="c08cc298ceb8f71db2439ca4877253880de7cc65639984bee4c5639d100e9bc9"
 
 ACFS_MODULES_IN_ORDER=(
   "base.system"
